name: @promptowl/contextnest-cli
description: Command-line tool for Context Nest vault operations

scripts.postinstall:
echo "
  Context Nest CLI installed successfully.

  Get started:
    ctx init --starter developer    # Engineering vault
    ctx init --starter executive    # Strategy vault
    ctx init --starter analyst      # Research / OSINT vault
    ctx init --starter team         # Team knowledge base
    ctx init --list-starters        # See all options

  Or just run: ctx init

  Docs: https://github.com/PromptOwl/context-nest
  Context Nest by PromptOwl — https://promptowl.com
"
